title: Polymorph P2P Network Algorithm
summary: The Polymorph P2P network algorithm is based on my own, new P2P polyring topology designed especially with media routing in mind. I believe it is better suited at media routing than Chord, Kademlia, Pastry and Taspestry.
content: The Polymorph P2P network algorithm is based on my own, new P2P polyring topology designed especially with media routing in mind. I believe it is better suited at media routing than Chord, Kademlia, Pastry and Taspestry.
